response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel source modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like real-time applications
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C programming experience in UNIX/embedded context as required
No evidence of Linux kernel analysis or modification skills
Japanese language proficiency is absent; English is fluent but not sufficient without Japanese
